issues.title: EPIC-ENTRY-001 TASK-04: Cross-scanner entry trigger backtest
issues.notes: Backtest: Enhanced>=90 AND Setup VCB/PULLBACK within +/-2 days on same symbol. Tasks 01-03 done. TASK-04 is the architecturally correct entry timing piece.

issues.title: EPIC-PUB-001: Weekly publication report generator
issues.notes: Top 20 by conviction_score, grouped by setup type, HTML output. Prerequisite for external sharing and monetization path.

issues.title: EPIC-FUNDS-001: SEC 13F institutional tracker
issues.notes: ~50 institutional funds via EDGAR API. Cross-ref with watchlist for confirmation signal. Highest-EV enrichment not yet built.

issues.title: EPIC-PORT-001: Portfolio correlation limits
issues.notes: Missing: portfolio-level correlation limits and max drawdown gate. Currently only ATR sizing + sector limits (max 4 per sector).

issues.title: v2.0 Planning: Customer-facing condensed view
issues.notes: Consolidate 14 tabs into 4 views: Today (Daily Setups), Research (Lookup + charts), Portfolio, System. v1.0 fine-tuning first.

issues.title: EPIC-INFRA-001: JupyterLab on jserv for research
issues.notes: JupyterLab on jserv for equity curve work, correlation analysis, walk-forward reruns. Separates research from production machine.

issues.title: Fundamental filter badges: Daily Setups + Signal Explorer
issues.notes: F-pass/fail/neutral/blocked badges wired into conviction_picks.json. Fund Pass toggle filter in Signal Explorer. EPIC-FUND-001 complete.

issues.title: TradingView price charts on Lookup tab
issues.notes: Flask /trading/api/history endpoint. Candlestick + SMA 20/50/200. TW Lightweight Charts v4.2 hosted locally. EPIC-INFRA-001 TASK-07 done.

issues.title: Confluence scanner wired to cron
issues.notes: db_scanner_confluence.py (SuperTrend+RSI+SMA200+ATR) added at 4:14 PM. Was stale since Mar 12. conf_scores now fresh daily.

issues.title: Dual regime sparklines on Overview breadth panel
issues.notes: Broad Breadth (30d) + Quality Regime (30d) sparklines stacked chronologically. BULL to NEUTRAL transition visible since early March.

issues.title: 3 new scanners + cross-scanner persistence tracking
issues.notes: Momentum Rebound, RSI Staircase, ATR Momentum live with cron. stack_strength = cluster_score x persistence_score in conviction_picks.

issues.title: Market regime + breadth dual-view panel
issues.notes: Quality Universe (market_regime.json ~723 symbols) + Broad Breadth (market_breadth.json 2632 symbols) side-by-side on Overview.
